title: 6 PCS 40mm Rubber Washers for Plumbing, Cone Sink Plug Rubber Seals for 1 1/2 Inch Drain Pipe, Waste Pipe Gaskets & Sink Odour Trap Seals, Universal Basin Waste Seal Kit (40MM/1.5")
features: 【Precision Fit for 40mm Pipes】 Designed with 43mm outer diameter and 38mm inner diameter, these rubber washers create a perfect seal for standard 40mm drainage pipes and 1.5" waste systems, preventing leaks and odors.

【Premium PVC Construction】 Made from high-quality, corrosion-resistant PVC material that withstands heat, wear, and deformation for long-lasting durability in kitchen, bathroom, and outdoor plumbing applications.
【Value Pack of 6 Washers】 Includes six replacement washers to fix multiple leaks or keep spares for future needs – an essential addition to any DIYer's or plumber's toolkit.
【Quick & Easy Installation】 Simply insert the conical washer into the pipe joint and tighten the cap for an instant watertight seal, no tools or professional skills required.
【Multi-Purpose Use】 Ideal for sealing sink drains, dish drainers, garden hoses, and outdoor plumbing systems. Perfect for renovations, repairs, or routine maintenance.
description: 40mm Conical Sealing Rubber Rings - 6-Piece Plumbing Washer Set Ensure leak-proof connections in your plumbing system with our high-quality 40mm conical rubber sealing rings. Designed for kitchen sinks, drain pipes, basin waste systems, and outdoor water applications, these durable washers create a tight, watertight seal to prevent leaks and odors. Made from flexible yet sturdy rubber, they resist wear, corrosion, and high temperatures for long-lasting performance. Specifications: - Material: High-grade rubber (flexible & waterproof) - Color: Black - Dimensions: ----Outer Diameter: 43mm ----Inner Diameter: 38mm ----Thickness: 2mm - Temperature Resistance: Suitable for hot & cold water Package Includes: - 6 x 40mm Conical Sealing Rubber Rings Note: 1. For best results, ensure pipes are clean and dry before installation. 2. Replaces worn-out, cracked, or damaged washers to restore a tight seal. 3. Not suitable for high-pressure systems (e.g., pressurized water lines).
